description: Zoho MCP is a Zoho service for creating Model Context Protocol servers that expose tools from Zoho and third-party services to AI clients. Users configure tools in a Zoho-hosted MCP server and connect that server to clients such as Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf, or VS Code.
summary: zohomcp.ae exposes an MCP server surface for Zoho MCP; docs describe connecting a copied MCP URL from the Zoho MCP console to MCP clients, with the URL itself carrying a secure API key.
